mapper.select: select trace_id, min(create_time) as start_time, max(create_time) as end_time, max(session_id) as session_id, max(user_id) as user_id, case when bool_or(lower(status) = 'failed') then 'FAILED' when bool_or(lower(status) = 'running') then 'RUNNING' else 'SUCCESS' end as status, greatest( sum(coalesce(latency_ms, 0)), cast(round(extract(epoch from (max(create_time) - min(create_time))) * 1000) as bigint), 1 ) as duration_ms from t_qa_trace_log where trace_id = #{traceId} group by trace_id

select trace_id, stage, status, latency_ms, payload_ref, create_time, session_id, user_id, next_create_time, id from ( select trace_id, stage, status, latency_ms, payload_ref, create_time, session_id, user_id, id, lead(create_time) over (partition by trace_id order by create_time asc, id asc) as next_create_time from t_qa_trace_log where trace_id = #{traceId} ) t order by create_time asc, id asc
